papers.title: Uneven Evolution of Cognition Across Generations of Generative AI Models
papers.reason: Excluded because it benchmarks the cognitive abilities of generative AI models rather than studying human participants.

papers.title: ASR-Agnostic Multimodal Spectrotemporal Modeling for Early Dementia Detection
papers.reason: The paper develops a speech-based dementia biomarker from human clinical elicitation data but does not centrally analyze an interactive decision task, eye tracking, qualifying EEG, or a cognitive process model.

papers.title: Demystifying Video Reasoning
papers.reason: Excluded because it studies reasoning and working memory inside diffusion-based video generation models rather than human cognition.

papers.title: The Richest Paradigm You're Not Using: Commercial Videogames at the Intersection of Human-Computer Interaction and Cognitive Science
papers.reason: The proposed methodology centrally combines interactive commercial-game behavior with eye tracking and behavioral timing to study human attention and executive function.

papers.title: Pupillometry and Brain Dynamics for Cognitive Load in Working Memory
papers.reason: Human participants perform a sequential digit-span task while pupillometry is analyzed as a cognitive-load biomarker, although the EEG analysis described does not establish qualifying frequency-domain or connectivity methods.

papers.title: Quant VideoGen: Auto-Regressive Long Video Generation via 2-Bit KV-Cache Quantization
papers.reason: Excluded because it concerns video generation and KV-cache memory in machine learning models rather than human participants.

papers.title: Cognitive Load Estimation Using Brain Foundation Models and Interpretability for BCIs
papers.reason: The study targets continuous human cognitive-load monitoring with EEG, but the summary provides no interactive task details or qualifying frequency-domain or connectivity analysis.

papers.title: Cross-Modal Computational Model of Brain-Heart Interactions via HRV and EEG Feature
papers.reason: A human working-memory task supplies cognitive-load conditions, but the main method is ECG-to-EEG regression and the reported EEG features are limited to band power rather than qualifying spectral or connectivity analysis.

papers.title: Unveiling the Heart-Brain Connection: An Analysis of ECG in Cognitive Performance
papers.reason: The study includes a human working-memory paradigm, but its central contribution is ECG-based workload classification using EEG band-power targets rather than detailed frequency-domain or connectivity analysis.

papers.title: Your Eyes Controlled the Game: Real-Time Cognitive Training Adaptation based on Eye-Tracking and Physiological Data in Virtual Reality
papers.reason: The study centrally combines interactive adaptive VR tasks for attention and working memory with human eye tracking to estimate cognitive load and control task difficulty in real time.
